Issue: Icon button contains only an SVG with no accessible name. Screen readers will announce it as an empty button.
Recommendation: Add aria-label describing the button action, e.g. <button aria-label="Toggle view">. Also add role="img" and aria-hidden="true" on decorative SVGs, or add a <title> inside the SVG.

Issue: Second icon button also lacks an accessible name. Same issue as A1.
Recommendation: Add aria-label to the button and mark the SVG appropriately.

Issue: SVG elements lack role="img" or aria-hidden="true". Assistive technology may try to traverse SVG internals.
Recommendation: Add aria-hidden="true" to decorative SVGs, or role="img" with a <title> for meaningful ones.

Issue: Same SVG accessibility issue on the second icon.
<nav> element has no aria-label or aria-labelledby. When multiple nav landmarks exist on a page, assistive tech cannot distinguish them.
Recommendation: Add aria-label="Main navigation" or use aria-labelledby pointing to the h1.

Issue: tag lacks explicit width and height attributes. While alt text is present (good), missing dimensions contribute to CLS and can cause reflow for assistive tech users.
Recommendation: Add width and height attributes to the img element.

Issue: Reading offsetHeight then immediately writing style.minHeight causes forced synchronous reflow (layout thrashing). The browser must recalculate layout between the read and write.
Recommendation: Batch DOM reads and writes separately. Use requestAnimationFrame to defer the write, or use ResizeObserver to react to size changes without forcing reflow.

Issue: setTimeout dynamically injects content after 500ms without any size reservation. This causes Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) because surrounding elements shift when the new items appear.
Recommendation: Reserve space for dynamic content using min-height or a skeleton/placeholder. Alternatively, fetch data before initial render using SSR or a loading state with fixed dimensions.

Issue: Image below the fold lacks loading="lazy". It will be fetched eagerly on page load even if not visible, wasting bandwidth and delaying LCP.
Recommendation: Add loading="lazy" to images that are below the fold:

Issue: Image lacks explicit width/height. The browser cannot reserve space before the image loads, contributing to CLS.
Recommendation: Specify width and height attributes so the browser can calculate the aspect ratio before the image loads.

Issue: List items rendered via .map() lack a key prop. React will use index-based reconciliation by default, which can cause unnecessary re-renders and DOM mutations when the list changes.
Recommendation: Add a stable, unique key prop: items.map((item) => <div key={item} ...>)

Issue: Image uses a single src with no srcSet or <picture> element. On high-DPI or mobile screens, either a too-large or too-small image is served.
Recommendation: Use srcSet and sizes attributes, or a <picture> element, to serve appropriately sized images for different viewports.

Issue: useEffect runs after paint, so the layout measurement + style write (lines 12-13) happens after the user sees the initial render, causing a visible flash/shift.
Recommendation: Use useLayoutEffect for DOM measurements that affect visual layout, so the update happens before the browser paints.
